release_notes: V14.44 build 221 beta introduces parallel alarm processing. Automatic WhatsApp delivery now runs through a queued FreeRTOS cloud worker instead of blocking the Arduino main loop. TextMeBot caregiver spacing uses non-blocking task delays, urgent low/high jobs are prioritised, and one failed caregiver does not stop the remaining recipients. A dedicated high-priority audio task owns live buzzer pulse timing, so HTTPS/provider activity cannot freeze the buzzer pattern. Urgent low has no long macro silence and normal low uses a five-second macro pause. The Web UI gains an Acknowledge alarm and snooze action; acknowledgement suppresses repeat WhatsApp messages for the current alarm episode while allowing its first notification to finish. Cloud worker, audio-task and maximum-loop-gap diagnostics are shown in Current status. All Build 220 unified glucose fonts and earlier Nightscout, trend, sensor, IOB/COB, OTA and WhatsApp configuration functions are preserved.
